notes: Recommended changes: add or attach a direct misinformation-monitoring source if making claims about online/common consumer narratives; keep FDA compounding-risk language narrow and source-scoped; separate compounded, research/vendor, investigational, and any approved-product contexts; avoid efficacy or “healing peptide” language; summarize preclinical interest separately from proven human outcomes; add route/formulation-specific safety context where available; then send the updated draft back through human re-review.
